text_fr: de  la  resolution  389  (V)  qu'elle  avait  adoptee  le 15  decembre  1950,  et en  ayant pris acte,
text_en: of resolution 389 (V) adopted by the General Assembly on 15 December 1950, and having taken note of it,

text_fr: Ayant entendu }'expose d'un representant du Royau› me-Uni de  Libye 1 4,
text_en: Having heard ''exhibition of a representative of the Royau› me-Uni of Libya 1 4,

text_fr: Estimant que  le  probleme  des  dommages  de  guerre doit etre etudie clans  le  cadre general des plans d'ensem› ble  pour le  developpement  economique  du pays,
text_en: Considering that the problem of war damage must be examined in the general framework of the national economic development plans,

text_fr: Invite le Secretaire  general  et  les  institutions  qui participent aux travaux du Bureau de  !'assistance tech› nique a examiner  favorablement  Jes  demandes  d'assis› tance  fon;nulees  par  le  Gouvernement  libyen  touchant des programmes de developpement economique qui  ren› forceraient l'economie de  la Libye,  y  compris la  remise en  etat  ou  la  reconstruction  des  biens  et  installations publics  et  prives  endommages,  et a designer, a cet egard, a la demande  du  Gouvernement  libyen,  Jes experts  supplementaires  dont  les  services  pourraient etre necessaires  pour  rassembler  Jes  donnees  requises, achever  l'etude du  probleme  des  dommages  de  guerre et presenter des  recommandations.
text_en: Invites the Secretary General and the institutions participating in the work of the Technical Assistance Office to consider favourably my requests for assistance from the Libyan Government concerning economic development programmes which would force the economy of Libya, including the restoration or reconstruction of damaged public and private property and facilities, and has designed, in this regard, at the request of the Libyan Government, additional experts whose services may be necessary to gather Jes données required, complete the study of the problem of war damage and make recommendations.

text_fr: 366eme seance pleniere, le 29 janvier 1952.
text_en: 366th plenary session, 29 January 1952.

text_fr: 530  (VI).  Dispositions  economiques  et  financie· res relatives a l'Erythree
text_en: 530 (VI). Economic and financial provisions relating to Eritrea

text_fr: Attendu qu'en conformite des  dispositions de !'article 23 et du paragraphe 3 de  !'annexe XI du Traite de  paix avec l'Italie 15 , la  question du  sort des anciennes colonies italiennes a ete soumise le  15  septembre 1948 a 1' Assem› blee  generale  par  les  Gouvernements  de  la  France  de l'Union  des  Republiques  socialistes  sovietiques,' du Royaume-Uni  de  Grande-Bretagne  et  d'Irlande  du Nord et des  Etats-Unis d'Amerique,
text_en: Whereas, in accordance with the provisions of Article 23 and paragraph 3 of Annex XI to the Treaty of Peace with Italy 15 , the question of the fate of the former Italian colonies was submitted on 15 September 1948 by the Governments of France of the Union of Soviet Socialist Republics, the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the United States of America,

text_fr: Attendu qu'en  vertu  des  dispositions  precitees,  Jes quatre Puissances ont convenu d'accepter la  recomman› dation de l'Assemblee generale et  de  prendre Jes  mesu› res appropriees pour la  mettre a execution,
text_en: Whereas by virtue of the precise provisions, Is four Powers have agreed to accept the recommendation of the General Assembly and to take Jes mesu› res appropriate to implement it,

text_fr: Attendu que  l'Assemblee generale,  par sa  resolution 390  (V)  du  2  decembre  1950,  a  recommande  que l'Erythree constitue  une  unite  autonome,  federee  avec l'Ethiopie sous la  souverainete de  la  Couronne d'Ethio› pie,  au  plus  tard  le IS  septembre  1952,  a  etabli  Jes dispositions  necessaires a la  federation  de  l'Erythree avec l'Ethiopie et n'a laisse a !'Organisation des  Nations Unies  que  le  soin  de  regler  le  probleme  dont  il  est question  au  paragraphe 19  de  !'annexe XIV du  Traite de paix avec  l'Italie, en tenant compte  notamment qu'il importe  d'assurer le  maintien  de  la  collaboration  des communautes etrangeres au developpement economique de l'Erythree,
text_en: Whereas the General Assembly, by its resolution 390 (V) of 2 December 1950, recommended that Eritrea constitute an autonomous unit, federate with Ethiopia under the sovereignty of the Crown of Ethio› pie, by no later than IS September 1952, has established the necessary arrangements for the federation of Eritrea with Ethiopia and has left to the United Nations only the task of addressing the problem referred to in paragraph 19 of Annex XIV to the Treaty of Peace with Italy, bearing in mind in particular the importance of ensuring the continued cooperation of foreign communities in the economic development of Eritrea,

text_fr: Attendu que  le  paragraphe  19  de  l'annexe XIV  du Traite de  paix avec l'Italie, qui  contient les  dispositions economiques  et  financieres  relatives  aux  territoires cedes,  prevoit  que  "Jes  dispositions  de  la  presente annexe ne seront pas applicables aux anciennes colonies italiennes.  Les  dispositions  economiques  et  financieres qui  leur  seront  appliquees  seront  incluses  clans  Jes
text_en: Whereas paragraph 19 of Annex XIV to the Treaty of Peace with Italy, which contains the economic and financial provisions relating to the territories concerned, provides that "I provisions of this Annex shall not apply to the former Italian colonies.

text_fr: arrangements qui, aux termes de !'article 23  du present Traite,  regleront le  sort de  ces  territoires",
text_en: arrangements which, pursuant to Article 23 of this Treaty, will regulate the fate of these territories",

text_fr: Attendtt qu'il est souhaitable d'arreter les dispositions economiques  et  financieres  relatives a l'Erythree avant que  ce  territoire  constitue  une  unite  autonome  federee avec  l'Ethiopie  sous  la  souverainete  de  la  Couronne d'Ethiopie, afin  que ces  dispositions  puissent etre mises en application le  plus tot possible,
text_en: Whereas it is desirable to adopt the economic and financial provisions relating to Eritrea before that territory constitutes an autonomous unit federee with Ethiopia under the sovereignty of the Crown of Ethiopia, so that these provisions can be implemented as soon as possible,

text_fr: L' Assemblee generate
text_en: The General Assembly

text_fr: Appro1we Jes  articles  suivants:
text_en: Approach1we Is following articles:

text_fr: Article  premier
text_en: Article 1

items_fr: 1. Sous  reserve  des  dispositions  des  paragraphes  4 et  5  du  present  article,  l'Erythreea recevra,  sans  paie› ment, Jes  biens meubles et immeubles situes en  Erythree dont le  proprietaire est l'Etat italien, en son nom propre ou au nom de  l'administration italienne de  l'Erythree, et ces  biens  seront  transferes a l'Erythree au plus  tard a la  date  effective  de  la  transmission  definitive  des  pou› voirs par la  Puissance administrante aux autorites com› petentes mentionnees au paragraphe 14 de  la  resolution 390  (V) de  l'Assemblee generale des  Nations Unies.
2. Les  biens  mentionnes  au  paragraphe  1  seront consideres  comme  comprenant:
a)  Les  biens  constituant le  domaine  public  de  l'Etat ( denianio  pubblico) ;
b) Le patrimoine indisponible  de  1:Etat (patrimonio indisponibile) ;
c) Les biens du parti fasciste  et de  ses  organisations, telles  qu'elles sont  enumerees a !'article  10  du  decret royal  italien  n ·  513,  en  date  du  28  avril  1938;
d) Les  biens  disponibles  de  l'Etat (patrimonio  dis› ponibile) ;
e) Les  biens  appartenant aux agences  autonomes  de l'Etat ( azicndc  aittonome), qui  sont  les  suivantes:
items_en: 1. Subject to the provisions of paragraphs 4 and 5 of this Article, Eritrea shall receive, without payment, my movable and immovable property situated in Eritrea, the owner of which is the Italian State, in its own name or on behalf of the Italian Administration of Eritrea, and such property shall be transferred to Eritrea no later than the effective date of the final transmission by the administering Power to the competent authorities referred to in paragraph 14 of Resolution 390 (V) of the General Assembly of the United Nations.
2. The goods referred to in paragraph 1 shall be considered to include:
(a) The property constituting the public domain of the State (denianio pubblico);
(b) The non-available heritage of 1: State (patrimonio indisponibile);
(c) The property of the fascist party and its organizations, as listed in article 10 of Royal Decree No. 513 of 28 April 1938;
(d) The goods available from the State (patrimonio dis› ponibile);
(e) The property belonging to the autonomous agencies of the State (azicndc ottonome), which are:

text_fr: Ferro,z-ie  dell' Eritrea,
text_en: Ferro, Ie dell'Eritrea,

text_fr: Azienda Speciale  Approvigionamenti,
text_en: Azienda Speciale Approvigionamenti,

text_fr: Azienda  Miniere  Africa  Orientate (A.M.A.0.),
text_en: Azienda Miniere Africa Orientale (A.M.A.0.),

text_fr: Azienda Autonoma Strade Statali (A.A.S.S.);
text_en: Azienda Autonoma Strade Statali (A.A.S.S.);

text_fr: f) Les  droits  de  l'Etat italien  sous  forme  de  parts et  de  droits  analogues  clans  Jes  capitaux  des  etablisse› ments,  societes  et  associations  de  caractere  public  qui ont  leur  siege  social  en  Erythree.  Lorsque  l'activite desdits  etablissements,  societes  et associations  s'etend a l'Italie OU  a des  pays  autres que  l'Erythree, l'Erythree recevra  uniquement  Jes  droits  de  l'Etat italien  ou  de !'administration italienne  de  l'Erythree qui  ne  concer› nent  que  leur  activite  en  Erythree.  Dans  les  cas  ou l'Etat italien  ou  !'administration italienne  de  l'Erythree n'avait dans  ces  etablissements,  societes  et  associations que  des  fonctions  de  direction,  l'Erythree ne  pourra pretendre a aucun  droit  clans  ces  organismes.
text_en: (f) The rights of the Italian State in the form of shares and similar rights of the institutions, companies and associations of public character which have their place of business in Erythree. Where the activities of such establishments, companies and associations extend to Italy OR to countries other than Erythree, the Erythree shall receive only the rights of the Italian State or of the Italian Administration of Erythree which concern only their activities in Erythree. In cases where the Italian State or the Italian Administration of Erythree had in these establishments, societies and associations only managerial functions, the Erythree shall not be entitled to any rights of such bodies.

items_fr: 3. Les  biens,  etablissements,  societes  et associations mentionnes  au  paragraphe  2  du  present  article  seront transferes tels qu'ils existeront a la  date du transfert, et
items_en: 3. The assets, establishments, companies and associations referred to in paragraph 2 of this article shall be transferred as they will exist on the date of the transfer, and

text_fr: l'Erythree assumera  toutes  les  obligations  et  tout  le passif  existant a cette  date  en  ce  qui  concerne les  insti› tutions  susvisees.
text_en: the Erythree will assume all the obligations and liabilities existing on that date in respect of the above-mentioned investments.

items_fr: 4. Parmi  les  biens  qui  sont  enumeres  au  paragra› phe 2 du present article,  l'Italie gardera la propriete des biens  suivants : ·
a)  Les  immeubles  necessaires  au fonctionnement  de la representation  gouvernementale  italienne  en  Ery› threeb;
b) Les biens  meubles  et  immeubles  qui, a la  date  de la  presente  resolution,  servent  au  fonctionnement  des ecoles  et  des  hopitaux  de  la  communaute  italienne  en Erythree.

5. Parmi  les  biens  enumeres  au  paragraphe  2  du present  article,  Jes  edifices  du  culte  (y  compris  les terrains sur lesquels ils  sont batis et leurs dependances) seront  transferes  par  l'Italie  aux  communautes  reli› gieuses  interessees. ·

6. Les  cimetieres,  Jes  monuments  et  les  ossuaires italiens  en  Erythree  seront  respectes.  Des  dispositions pour  leur  conservation  et  leur  entretien  seront  prises entre  l'Italie et,  lorsque  l'Erythree sera  devenue  une unite  autonome  federee  avec l'Ethiopie, l'autorite com› petente en  vertu de  l'Acte federal.

7. Sous  reserve  des  dispositions  des  paragraphes 4, 5  et  6  du  present  article,  aucune  des  stipulations  du paragraphe  1  du  present  article  ne  sera  consideree comme  restreignant  en  aucune  fa<;on  le  droit  qu'a la Puissance administrante de disposer, pendant la periode de  son  administration,  pour  la  duree  de  ladite  periode ou  pour  toute  autre  duree,  des  biens  mentionnes  au paragraphe  2  du  present  article,  conformement  aux prescriptions  de  la  loi,  aux  exigences  de  la  bonne administration  du  Territoire  ou  aux  necessites  de  la mise  en  ceuvre  que  la  presente  resolution  peut  rendre necessai res.
items_en: 4. Among the goods listed in paragraph 2 of this article, Italy shall retain the ownership of the following goods: ·
(a) The buildings necessary for the operation of the Italian government representation in Ery› threeb;
(b) Moveable and immovable property which, on the date of the present resolution, is used for the operation of schools and hospitals of the Italian Community in Erythree.

5. Among the goods listed in paragraph 2 of this article, Is buildings of worship (including the land on which they are built and their dependencies) will be transferred by Italy to the connected communities. ·

6. The Cimetieres, Jes monuments and the Italian ossuary in Erythree will be respected. Arrangements for their conservation and maintenance will be made between Italy and, when the Erythree becomes an autonomous unit federee with Ethiopia, the authority com› petente under the Federal Act.

7. Subject to the provisions of paragraphs 4, 5 and 6 of this article, none of the provisions of paragraph 1 of this article shall be construed as restricting in any way the right of the administering Power to dispose, during the period of its administration, of the property referred to in paragraph 2 of this article for the duration of the said period or for any other duration, in accordance with the requirements of the law, the requirements of the proper administration of the Territory or the requirements of the implementation which this resolution may make necessary.

text_fr: Article  II
text_en: Article II

items_fr: 1. Sous  reserve  des  dispositions  du  present article, la  Puissance administrante conservera la  garde de  tous les  documents  et  archives  publics  se  trouvant  en  Ery› three,  qui  concernent  des  questions  adtninistratives  ou techniques  relatives a l'Erythree  OU  des  biens  qui doivent  etre transferes  par l'Italie aux termes de  }'arti› cle  premier  de  la  presente  resolution,  ou qui  sont  pour d'autres raisons necessaires a !'administration du Terri› toire.

2. L'Italie remettra a la  Puissance  administrante, lorsque  celle-ci  lui  en  fera  la  demande,  }'original ou la copie  de  tous  documents  ou  archives  publics  analogues se  trouvant en  Italie.

3. La  Puissance  administrante  remettra a l'Italie, lorsque  celle-ci  lui  en  £era  la  demande,  l'original ou  la copie  de  tous  documents  ou  archives  publics  qui  se trouvent en Erythree et qui  interessent l'Italie, des  res› sortissants  italiens  ou  ?es personnes  morales  italiennes, notamment  les  ressorhssants  ou  les  personnes  morales
items_en: 1. Subject to the provisions of this article, the administering Power shall retain the custody of all public documents and archives in Ery› three, which relate to technical or adutninistrative matters relating to Eritrea OR to property which is to be transferred by Italy under Article 1 of this Resolution, or which is for other reasons necessary for the administration of the Territory.
2. Italy shall transmit to the administering Power, at the request of the administering Power, the original or copy of any similar public documents or archives in Italy.

3. The administering Power shall give to Italy, when the latter so requests, the original or a copy of any public documents or archives in Erythree which are of interest to Italy, of Italian nationals or of Italian legal persons, in particular those who are or are legal persons.

text_fr: qui  ont  transfere  OU  transfereront  leur  residence  en Italie.
text_en: who have transferred OR will transfer their residence to Italy.

items_fr: 4. Les  droits  et  obligations  de  la  Puissance  admi› nistrante  aux ,termes  des  dispositions  precedentes  du present article seront, lorsque l'Erythree sera constituee en  unite  autonome  federee  avec  l'Ethiopie,  devolus a !'autorite  competente  en  vertu  de  1' Acte  federal, a laquelle  la  Puissance  administrante  remettra  les  docu› ments  et  archives  publics  rei;us  de  l'Italie.

5. La remise des  originaux ou des  copies  des  docu› ments et archives ci-dessus mentionnes ne sera soumise a aucune  redevance  ni a aucun  impot;  les  frais  de transport  incomberont  au  gouvernement  qui  demande ces  pieces.
items_en: 4. The rights and obligations of the administering Power to the terms of the preceding provisions of this article shall be, when the Eritrea is constituted as an autonomous unit federee with Ethiopia, devolus a!'authority competent under the Federal Act, to which the administering Power shall hand over the documents and public archives rei;us of Italy.

5. The furnishing of the originals or copies of the documents and archives referred to above shall not be subject to any charge or charge; the cost of transport shall be borne by the Government requesting such items.

text_fr: Article  III
text_en: Article III

text_fr: Les  organisations  italiennes · d'assurance sociale  qui fonctionnent  actuellement  en  Erythree  devront  conti› nuer  de  s'acquitter pleinement  de  toutes  leurs  obliga› tions  respectives a l'egard des  assures,  conformement aux  dispositions  de  la  legislation  actuelle  en  matiere d'assurance sociale,  et  les  obligations  et  droits  legaux actuels  desdites organisations seront respectes.  Par voie d'accord entre l'autorite competente  en vertu de l'Acte federal  et  lesdites  organisations,  ces  obligations  pour› rant  etre  etendues  de  maniere a concerner  d'autres categories d'assures.
text_en: The Italian social insurance organisations currently operating in Erythree will continue to have to comply fully with all their respective obligations with regard to the insured persons, in accordance with the provisions of the current legislation on social insurance, and the obligations and legal rights of the said organizations will be respected. By agreement between the competent authority under the Federal Act and the said organizations, these obligations for which other categories of insured persons have to be covered by the present legal obligations and rights.

text_fr: Article  IV
text_en: Article IV

items_fr: 1. L'Italie restera  tenue  d'assurer le  paiement  des pensions  civiles  et  militaires  et  des  autres  prestations de  retraite  acquises a la  date  d'entree en  vigueur  du Traite de  paix avec  l'ltalie et dont elle  etait debitrice a cette  date.

2. Le  montant  de  ces  pensions  ou  prestations  de retraite  sera  determine  conformement a la  legislation qui  etait  en vigueur  en  Erythree immediatement avant la  cessation de !'administration du Territoire par l'Italie et  sera  verse  directement  par  l'Italie, clans  la  monnaie clans  laquelle  elles  auront  ete  acquises,  aux  personnes qui  y  ont  droit.
items_en: 1. Italy shall continue to be obliged to ensure payment of civil and military pensions and other retirement benefits acquired on the date of entry into force of the Peace Treaty with Italy and of which it was responsible on that date.

2. The amount of such pensions or retirement benefits shall be determined in accordance with the legislation which was in force in Erythree immediately before the termination of the administration of the Territory by Italy and shall be paid directly by Italy, in the currency which they have been acquired, to the persons entitled to it.

text_fr: Article  V
text_en: Article V

text_fr: L'Erythree sera exemptee  de  toute  partie de  la  dette publique  italienne.
text_en: Eritrea will be exempt from any part of the Italian public debt.

text_fr: Article  VI
text_en: Article VI

text_fr: L'Italie restituera,  clans  le  plus  bref delai  possible, a leurs  proprietaires,  tous  les  bateaux  detenus  par  elle, par ses  ressortissants ou par des personnes morales ita› liennes  et  qui  seront  prouves  avoir  ete  la  propriete d'anciens sujets  erythreens  OU  avoir  ete  immatricules en  Erythree,  sauf  s'il  s'agit  de  bateaux  qui  ant  ete acquis de bonne foi.
text_en: Italy will return, clans as short as possible, to their owners, all the ships owned by it, by its nationals or by legal persons ita› liens and which will be proved to have been the owner of former subjects erythreens OR to have been impatricles in Erythree, unless they are ships which were acquired in good faith.

text_fr: Article VII
text_en: Article VII

items_fr: 1. Les  biens,  droits  et  interets  des  ressortissants italiens,  y  compris  les  personnes  morales  italiennes en Erythree,  seront  respectes, a condition  qu'ils aient ete acquis  conformement a la  legislation  en  vigueur  au moment de !'acquisition. Ils ne  seront pas traites moins favorablement que les  biens, droits et interets des autres ressortissants etrangers, y  compris les  personnes mora,.. les  de  nationalite  etrangere.

2. Les  ressortissants  italiens  en  Erythree  qui  ont quitte OU  qui  quitteront l'Erythree pour s'installer clans un autre pays seront autorises a vendre librement leurs biens  meubles  et  immeubles, a realiser leurs actifs  et a en disposer et,  apres acquittement des  dettes et imposi› tions  dont ils  pourraient etre redevables  en Erythree, a transferer leurs biens  meubles et les  foods  qu'ils posse› dent,  y compris le  produit des  transactions mentionnees ci-dessus, a moins que ces biens et ces  foods  n'aient ete illegalement acquis.  Le transfert  de  ces  biens  ou  de  ces foods  ne  sera frappe  d'aucun droit  d'exportation.
items_en: 1. The property, rights and interests of Italian nationals, including Italian legal persons in Eritrea, shall be respected, provided that they have been acquired in accordance with the legislation in force at the time of acquisition. They shall not be treated less favourably than the property, rights and interests of other foreign nationals, including mora, foreign nationals.

2. Italian nationals in Erythree who have left OR who will leave Erythree to settle in another country will be allowed to freely sell their movable and immovable property, to realize and dispose of their assets and, after payment of the debts and charges to which they may be liable in Erythree, to transfer their movable property and the food they possess, including the proceeds of the transactions mentioned above, unless those goods and food have also been unlawfully acquired. The transfer of these goods or food will not be subject to any export duty.

text_fr: La  procedure  concernant  le  transfert  d'Erythree de ces  biens  ou  foods  et les  delais  clans  lesquels  ils  pour› root etre transferes seront determines par voie d'accord, d'une part, entre la  Puissance administrante ou, lorsque l'Erythree  sera  devenue  une  unite  autonome  federee avec l'Ethiopie, l'autorite competente en vertu de  l' Acte federal,  et,  d'autre  part,  l'Italie.  Cet  accord  ne  res› treindra  pas  le  droit  de  transfert  prevu  ci-de.;sus.
text_en: The procedure for the transfer of these goods or food from Eritrea and the periods from which they are transferred shall be determined by agreement between the administering Power or, when Eritrea becomes an autonomous unit federee with Ethiopia, the competent authority under the Federal Act, and Italy.

items_fr: 3. Les societes constituees conformement a la  legis› lation italienne et dont le  siege  social  est  situe  en  Italie seront traitees  conformement aux dispositions  du para› graphe 2 ci-dessus.
items_en: 3. Companies which are incorporated in accordance with the Italian legislation and whose registered office is situated in Italy shall be treated in accordance with the provisions of paragraph 2 above.

text_fr: Les societes constituees conformement a la legislation italienne  et  dont  le  siege  social  est  situe  en  Erythree, et qui desirent transferer leur siege social  clans  un autre pays,  seront egalement  traitees  conformement aux dis› positions  du  paragraphe  2  ci-dessus, a condition  que plus de  SO  pour 100 du capital  de  la societe  appartienne a des  personnes  residant  habituellement  en  dehors  de l'Erythree,  et a condition  que  la  societe  exerce  son activite  en  majeure  partie hors  de  l'Erythree.
text_en: Companies which are incorporated in accordance with Italian legislation and whose social seat is situated in Eritrea, and which transfer their social seat to another country, shall also be treated in accordance with the provisions of paragraph 2 above, provided that more than SO per cent of the capital of the company belongs to persons habitually residing outside Eritrea, and provided that the company carries on its business mainly outside Eritrea.

items_fr: 4. Les biens,  droits et interets existant en Italie des anciens ressortissants italiens d'Erythree, ainsi que ceux des societes  precedemment  constituees  conformement a la  legislation  italienne  et  ayant  leur  siege  social  en Erythree  seront  respectes  par  l'Italie  dans  la  meme mesure  que  les  biens,  droits  et  interets  des  societes  et ressortissants  etrangers  en  general.

Ces  personnes  et  ces  societes  seront  autorisees a effectuer  le  transfert  et  la  liquidation  de  leurs  biens dr<;>its  et  inter~ts  dan~  les  memes  conditions  que  celle~ q!-u pourront  etre  prevues  en  vertu  du  paragraphe  2 c1-dessus.

5. Ni  les  dettes  des  personnes  residant  en  Italie envers des  personnes residant en  Erythree, ni  celles  des p~r.sonnes  resid\_ant  en  Erythree  envers  des  personnes res1dant  en  Itahe ne  seront affectees  par le  transfert de la  souverainete.  La Puissance administrante  l'Italie et lorsque  l'Erythree sera  devenue  une  unite' autonom~ federee  avec  l'Ethiopie, l'autorite competente  en  vertu de  1' Acte  federal  devront  faciliter  le  reglement  de  ces dettes. ,;'ux fins  du  present  paragraphe,  le  terme  "per› sonnes comprend  les  personnes  morales.
items_en: 4. The property, rights and interests existing in Italy of former Italian nationals of Eritrea, as well as those of companies previously constituted in accordance with Italian legislation and having their registered office in Eritrea, shall be respected by Italy to the same extent that the property, rights and interests of foreign nationals and societies in general.
These persons and companies shall be authorized to transfer and liquidate their property on the same terms and conditions as may be provided for under paragraph 2 above.

5. Neither the debts of persons residing in Italy to persons residing in Eritrea nor those of persons residing in Eritrea to persons residing in Itahe shall be affected by the transfer of the sovereignty. The administering Power of Italy and when Eritrea becomes an autonomous unit with Ethiopia, the competent authority under the Federal Act shall facilitate the settlement of such debts.

text_fr: Article V JI I
text_en: Article V JI I

items_fr: 1. Les biens,  droits et interets en  Erythree qui  font encore l'objet, en consequence de  la  guerre  de  mesures de saisie, d'administration forcee ou de  seq~estre  seront restitues a leurs  proprietaires. '
2. Aucune  des  dispositions  du  present  article  ne s'appliquera a une  acquisition  obligatoire  ou a une
items_en: 1. The property, rights and interests in Eritrea which are still the subject of the war, as a result of seizure, forceful administration or seq-estre measures, shall be returned to their owners.'
2. None of the provisions of this Article shall apply to a compulsory acquisition or to a

text_fr: requisition  effectuee  par  la  Puissance  administrante a des  fins d'interet  public  en  Erythree,  lorsque  cette acquisition obligatoire ou  cette requisition est conforme au  droit  civil  de  l'Erythree.
text_en: as required by the administering Power for public interest purposes in Erythree, where such compulsory acquisition or requirement is in accordance with the civil law of Erythree.

text_fr: Article IX
text_en: Article IX

items_fr: 1. Les  anciens  ressortissants  italiens  d'Erythree continueront a jouir  de  tous  les  droits  de  propriete industrielle,  litteraire  et  artistique  en  Italie  auxquels ils  pouvaient  pretendre sous  le  regime  de  la  legislation en  vigueur  lors  de  l'entree  en  vigueur  du  Traite  de paix.

2. En attendant que  les  conventions  internationales pertinentes  soient  applicables a l'Erythree, les  droits de propriete industrielle, litteraire et artistique qui exis› taient  en  Erythree  sous  le  regime  des  lois  italiennes seront  respectes  pendant la  periode  durant  laquelle  ils seraient  restes  en  v1gueur  sous  ce  regime.
items_en: 1. Former Italian nationals of Eritrea will continue to enjoy all the industrial, literary and artistic property rights in Italy to which they could lay down under the legislation in force at the time of the entry into force of the Peace Treaty.

2. Until the relevant international conventions are applicable to Eritrea, the rights of industrial, literary and artistic property which existed in Eritrea under the Italian laws shall be respected during the period during which they would remain in v1gueur under this regime.

text_fr: Article  X
text_en: Article X

items_fr: 1. Aux fins  du present article :

a) Le  terme "concession" designe l'octroi par l'ancienne  administration  italienne,  par  la  Puissance administrante,  ou  par  une  autorite  municipale,  de l'autorisation  d'exercer  certains  droits  determines  en l'Erythree OU  d'y  user  de  certains  biens  determines, moyennant des  obligations  precises a la  charge  du  con› cessionnaire  relativement a l'utilisation et a !'ameliora› tion desdits biens, ladite autorisation ayant ete accordee en conformite des  lois,  arretes et reglements en vigueur en  Erythree a l'epoque OU  elle  sera  intervenue;

b) L'expression "contrat a caractere  de  concession" s'entend  d'un  bail  portant  sur  des  terres  situees  en Erythree, consenti pour une periode de plusieurs annees par l'ancienne administration italienne, par la Puissance administrante  ou  par  une  autorite  municipale,  le  pre› neur  assumant,  en  vertu  de  ce  bail,  des  obligations analogues a celles d'un  concessionnaire  clans  le  cas d'une concession  et  !edit  bail  n'etant pas  consenti  aux termes  d'une loi,  d'un arrete  OU  d'un reglement  deter› mines  prevoyant  des  baux de  cette  nature.
2. Les  concessions  accordees a l'epoque  de  l'an› cienne administration italienne seront reconnues  comme etant  valables a tous  egards  et,  en  consequence,  ii  n'y sera  pas  porte  atteinte.

3. Lorsqu'un concessionnaire  aura  demontre, a la satisfaction  des  autorites competentes,  qu'un acte  cons› titutif  de  droits,  de  nature a regulariser  sa  concession aurait  du  lui  etre  delivre  mais  ne  l'a pas  ete  en  raiso~ de  circons!ances nees  de  la  guerre ou  de  force  majeure, et  que  lad1te  concession  n'aurait pas  ete  sujette a revo› cation  si  elle  avait  ete  regularisee  par la  delivrance  de cet  acte,  Jes  autorites  competentes  delivreront  au  con› ce~sionnaire\_  un  acte  constitutif  de  droits,  qui  aura  le meme effet Jllridique que celui  qui aurait du etre delivre a l'origine.

4. Lorsque,  s'agissant d'un contrat a caractere  de concession  accorde a l'epoque  de  l'ancienne  adminis› tration italienne, tm  bail  sera venu a expiration au cours de  la  periode  d'administration de  la  Puissance adminis› trante et  qu'il aura ete  renouvele a titre  provisoire  par ladite  Puissance ou  lorsqu'un bail  de  cette  nature aura
items_en: 1. For the purposes of this article:

(a) The term "concession" means the granting by the former Italian administration, by the administering Power, or by a municipal authority, of the authorization to exercise certain rights determined in Eritrea or to use certain property determined therein, subject to specific obligations on the part of the assignee in respect of the use and improvement of such property, the said authorization having been granted in accordance with the laws, decrees and regulations in force in Eritrea at the time of the application;

(b) "Contract a character of concession" means a lease of land situated in Eritrea, granted for a period of several years by the former Italian administration, by the administering Power or by a municipal authority, the former having obligations under that lease similar to those of a concessionaire in the case of a concession and the said lease not being granted under any law, a stop or settlement of the mines providing for such leases.
2. The concessions granted to the epoch of the year› cienne Italian administration will be recognized as valid in all respects and, accordingly, ii will not be affected.

3. When a concessionaire has shown, to the satisfaction of the competent authorities, that a constitutive act of rights, of such a nature as to regularise his concession would have been delivered but has not been in the form of circons of war or force majeure, and that the concession would not have been subject to revo cation if it had been regulated by the issue of that act, Is competent authorities shall issue to the constitutive instrument of rights, which shall have the same legal effect as that which should have been delivered at the origin.

4. Where, in respect of a concession contract granted to the epoch of the former Italian administration, the lease shall have expired during the period of administration of the administering Power, and it shall have been renewed provisionally by the said Power, or when such a lease has been granted

text_fr: ete  consenti a l'origine par la  Puissance administrante, ladite  Puissance  pourra  accorder  au  preneur,  si  elle estime  que  celui-ci  s'est acquitte  des  obligations  qui  lui incombaient  et  que  la  mesure  presente  des  avantages pour  l'economie  de  l'Erythree,  une  concession  de  la duree  qu'elle  jugera  appropriee,  compte  tenu  de  la nature des terres en question.
text_en: The said Power may grant to the lessee, if it considers that the lessee has fulfilled its obligations and that the measure presents advantages for the economy of Eritrea, a concession of the duration which it considers appropriate, taking into account the nature of the land in question.

items_fr: 5. Une concession ou un contrat a caractere de  con› cession,  accorde a l'epoque de  l'ancienne administration italienne,  ne  sera  pas  sujet a revocation  du  fait  que  le concessionnaire  ou  le  preneur aura omis  de  s'acquitter d'une obligation  quelconque  qui  lui  incombait  en  vertu de  la  concession  ou  du  contrat  lorsque  les  autorites competentes  estimeront  que  cette  omission  est  exclusi› vement  due a des  circonstances  nees  de  la  guerre  ou de force majeure.

6. Lorsqu'un concessionnaire  ou  un  preneur  aura demontre, a la  satisfaction  des  autorites  competentes, qu'un  acte  constatant  la  concession  ou  le  contrat a caractere de  concession  dont  il  est  titulaire  a  ete  perdu OU  detruit,  et  lorsque  les  autorites  competentes  seront en  mesure  de  connaitre  les  dispositions  de  cet  acte  et qu'elles  auront  la  conviction  que  la  concession  ou  le contrat a caractere de  concession n'est pas  sujet a revo› cation,  lesdites  autorites  delivreront  au concessionnaire ou  au  preneur un  nouvel  acte constitutif  de  droits  qui aura le  meme  effet  juridique que  celui  qui  a  ete  perdu OU  detruit.
items_en: 5. A concession or a contract has the character of assignment, grants to the epoch of the former Italian administration, will not be subject to revocation because the concessionaire or the lessee has failed to fulfil any obligation incumbent upon him by virtue of the concession or the contract when the competent authorities consider that this omission is excluded from due to circumstances necessitating from war or force majeure.

6. Where a concessionaire or a lessee has shown, to the satisfaction of the competent authorities, that an act establishing the concession or the contract has the character of concession of which he is the holder has been lost OR has been destroyed, and where the competent authorities will be in a position to know the provisions of that act and they will be satisfied that the concession or the contract has the character of concession is not subject to revo cation, the said authorizations shall issue to the concessionaire or the lessee a new instrument of constitutive rights which shall have the same legal effect as the one which has been lost OR has been destroyed.

text_fr: Article  XI
text_en: Article XI

items_fr: 1. II  sera  etabli  un  Tribunal  des  Nations  Unies, compose de trois personnalites choisies par le  Secretaire general pour leur competence  juridique parmi les  natio› naux  de  trois  Etats  differents  non  directement  inte› resses.  Toutes  ces  personnalites,  ou  certaines  d'entre elles,  pourront  etre  des  membres  du  Tribunal  prevu a !'article  X  de  la  resolution  388  (V)  de  l' Assemblee generale  des  Nations  Unies.  Le  Tribunal,  qui  se  pro› noncera en droit,  aura une  double  fonction:
a) II donnera a l'Italie et a la  Puissance  adminis› trante  ou,  lorsque  l'Erythree sera  devenue  une  unite
items_en: 1. A United Nations Tribunal shall be established, composed of three persons chosen by the Secretary-General for their legal competence from among the nations of three different States not directly integrated. All such persons, or some of them, may be members of the Tribunal provided for in Article X of Resolution 388 (V) of the General Assembly of the United Nations. The Tribunal, which shall act in law, shall have a dual function:
(a) It will give to Italy and to the administering Power or, when Eritrea has become a unit

text_fr: autonome  federee  avec  l'Ethiopie, a l'autorite compe› tente  en  vertu  de  I' Acte  federal,  les  instructions  que l'une ou  l'autre  d'entre elles  pourra  lui  demander  et qui  seront  necessaires  en  vue  de  !'execution de la  pre› sente  resolution;
text_en: In accordance with the Federal Act, the competent authority of Ethiopia shall attempt such instructions as may be requested by either of them and which shall be necessary for the implementation of the first resolution;

items_fr: b)  II  decidera  de  toutes  les  contestations  qui  surgi› raient entre lesdites autorites au sujet de !'interpretation et  de  !'execution de  la  presente  resolution.  II  pourra etre  saisi  par  requete  unilaterale.

2. Le Tribunal sera  seul  competent  pour  connaitre des  questions  entrant  clans  le  cadre  de  ses  attributions telles  qu'elles sont  defi.nies  au  paragraphe  1 du  present article. Lorsque le  Tribunal sera saisi d'une contestation quelconque,  toute  procedure qui  pourrait etre  en  cours devant  les  juridictions  civiles  sera  suspendue.

3. L'ltalie,  la  Puissance  administrante  et,  lorsque l'Erythree sera  devenue  une  unite  autonome  federee avec l'Ethiopie, l'autorite competente en vertu de  I' Acte federal  fourniront  le  plus  tot  possible  au  Tribunal  les informations  et  !'aide dont  il  pourra  avoir  besoin  pour l'accomplissement de  ses  fonctions.

4. Le  Tribunal  aura  son  siege  en  Erythree.  Le Tribunal determinera sa procedure. Toutes les  requetes mentionnees au paragraphe 1 du present article devront etre  presentees  au  Tribunal  le  31  decembre  1953  au plus  tard,  et le  Tribunal  se  prononcera  sur chacune  de ces  requetes  clans  un delai  qui  ne  pourra exceder  deux ans a compter de  la  date a laquelle i1 aura ete saisi.  Des qu'en application  des  dispositions  ci-dessus  le  Tribunal se  sera  prononce  sur toutes  les  requetes,  ses  fonctions prendront  fin.  Le  Tribunal  fournira  aux  parties  inte› ressees !'occasion d'exposer leurs vues,  et aura le  droit de  demander, a toute  autorite et a toute personne qu'il estimera en mesure de les lui donner, Jes  renseignements et  Jes  elements  de  preuve dont ii  aura besoin.  A  defaut d'unanimite, ii  se  prononcera a la  majorite  des  voix. Les  decisions  du  Tribunal  seront  sans  appel  et  obli› gatoires.
items_en: (b) It shall decide on all disputes which arise between the said authorities concerning the interpretation and execution of the present resolution. It may be seized by means of a unilateral request.

2. The Tribunal shall have sole jurisdiction over matters coming within the scope of its powers as set out in paragraph 1 of this article. When any challenge is brought before the Tribunal, any proceedings which may be pending before the civil courts shall be suspended.

3. Italy, the administering Power and, when Eritrea becomes an autonomous federal unit with Ethiopia, the competent authority under the Federal Act will provide the Tribunal as soon as possible with the information and assistance it may need for the performance of its functions.

4. The Tribunal shall have its seat in Erythree. The Tribunal shall determine its procedure. All requests referred to in paragraph 1 of this article shall be submitted to the Tribunal by 31 December 1953 at the latest, and the Tribunal shall decide on each of these requests within a period of time which shall not exceed two years from the date on which it has been seized. As soon as, pursuant to the above provisions, the Tribunal has decided on all requests, its functions shall cease. The Tribunal shall provide the interested parties with an opportunity to present their views, and shall have the right to request, to any authority and to any person whom it considers fit to give them, Is informed and Is elements of evidence which shall be required.

text_fr: 366eme seance  pleniere, le  29  janvie-r  1952.
text_en: 366th plenary session, 29 January 1952.
